no_seed_reason: built-in image_gen does not expose a stable numeric seed in this environment; source_default_path and workflow metadata are recorded in the workflow file
prompt: Cut-ready fantasy RPG blank UI kit source sheet for Rune Marches: one large modal panel, one tall journal panel, reward chip, status bar, idle/pressed/disabled buttons, icon frame, flat #ff00ff chroma background, large gutters, no text, no icons fused into buttons, no unique decoration inside slice9 stretch zones.
negative_prompt: text, numbers, fake glyphs, watermark, logos, icons fused into buttons, character art, map art, cropped items, item overlap, shadows on background, perspective tilt
rejected_candidate_notes: Candidate improves visual quality versus procedural scaffold and is a real generated bitmap sheet. Not accepted as final slice9 source yet: large panel and journal panel still include center-edge ornaments/diamonds that should be split into decor overlays or regenerated off the stretch zones.
